_instructions: Copy this file and rename for each business type (e.g., neurology_clinic.json). Remove lines starting with '_' before using.
_comment_business_type: STRING - Name of business type. Used for file naming and display.
_example_business_type: neurology clinic | cardiology clinic | orthopedics clinic
description: Neurology clinics and practices specializing in brain and nervous system disorders
_comment_description: STRING - Human-readable description of this business type

search._comment_query: STRING - Search query template. Use {business_type} and {city} placeholders.
search._example_query: neurology clinic in {city} | brain specialist in {city}
search._comment_results: INTEGER - Number of search results to fetch per city (typically 100)

categories.label: Group Practice
categories.description: Multiple practitioners, one or more locations

categories.label: Hospital Department
categories.description: Department or clinic within a hospital

categories.label: Directory/Aggregator
categories.description: Website listing multiple clinics (not an actual clinic)

categories.label: Other
categories.description: Not a clinic (unrelated business, general hospital page, etc.)

_comment_categories: ARRAY - Classification categories. LLM will classify each page into one of these.

clinic_name.description: Official name of the clinic or practice
clinic_name._comment_description: STRING - Instructions for LLM on what to extract

phone.description: Primary contact phone number (format: any, will be normalized later)

_comment_extraction_fields: OBJECT - Fields to extract. Add/remove fields as needed for this business type.

accepts_medicare.description: Does this clinic accept Medicare? Look for explicit mention.

questions._comment_field: STRING - Field name in output CSV (lowercase, underscores)
questions.question: Is this a hospital or a department/clinic within a hospital?
questions._comment_reasoning: BOOLEAN - Should LLM provide reasoning? (always true recommended)

questions.question: Is this clinic or hospital affiliated with a university or medical school?

_comment_questions: ARRAY - Yes/no questions with reasoning. Outputs: {field}_affiliated (boolean), {field}_reasoning (string)

_example_custom_question.question: Does this clinic offer telemedicine or virtual appointments?

llm._comment_max_tokens: INTEGER - Maximum tokens in response (1000-2000 typical)
llm._comment_temperature: NUMBER - Randomness (0 = deterministic, 1 = creative). Use 0 for classification.
